name: @hacksmith/doraval
author: Saif
description: Make agent context work on every try. Context engineering toolkit for coding agents (skills, plugins, rules) across Claude, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, and Grok.

scripts.build: rm -rf bin/doraval.js bin/chunk-*.js && bun build ./src/cli/index.ts --outdir ./bin --splitting --entry-naming=doraval.js --target bun
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const p=require('./package.json'),j=require('./jsr.json');if(p.version!==j.version){console.error('Version mismatch: package.json='+p.version+' jsr.json='+j.version);process.exit(1)};if(!p.optionalDependencies||!p.optionalDependencies['@hacksmith/doraval-darwin-arm64']){console.error('optionalDependencies not injected — run scripts/prepare-npm-publish.ts (CI does this). Refusing to publish a binary-less package.');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.site:build: bun scripts/gen-rule-docs.ts && cd apps/website && bun run build
